title: Formula
description: One named formula. Source of truth is one YAML file per formula under data/formulas/<domain>/.

id.description: Unique, stable, kebab-case identifier used as the primary key.

aliases.description: Searchable alternate names, abbreviations, and notation variants. Invest here for search accuracy.

subdomain.description: Free-form grouping within a domain (e.g. mechanics, thermodynamics).

tags.description: Freeform keywords; feed the semantic search surface.

latex.description: The payload. Must render without error in KaTeX (mhchem extension loaded).

description.description: One or two sentences; feeds semantic search and the UI.

relation.description: Machine-readable ASCII infix relation, parseable by math.js, using variables[].key symbols. Enables dimensional checking and quantity indexing. Optional.

variables.description: Symbol glossary powering the variables UI panel.

contributor.description: Optional GitHub handle of the contributor.
